en.summary: A Claude Code plugin for orchestrating complex tasks by delegating to multiple parallel Codex agents, then merging and reviewing results.

llm_summary.zh: Claudecode-codex-subagents 是一个为 Claude Code 设计的插件，用于将复杂任务分解并委托给多个并行的 Codex CLI 代理执行。核心功能包括任务分解、多代理并行执行和结果合并审查。适合需要利用多种 AI 代理协同完成复杂编码任务的开发者。
llm_summary.en: Claudecode-codex-subagents is a Claude Code plugin for delegating complex tasks to multiple parallel Codex CLI agents. It features task decomposition, parallel execution, and result merging/review. Suitable for developers who need multi-agent collaboration in coding.

llm_summary.zh: iSerter/laravel-claude-agents 是一个为 Laravel 框架定制的 Claude Code 子代理和技能集合。它提供了预定义的提示、规则和工作流，帮助 Laravel 开发者更高效地使用 Claude Code 进行编码、调试和项目维护。适合已在或准备使用 Claude Code 的 Laravel 开发者。
llm_summary.en: iSerter/laravel-claude-agents is a collection of Claude Code subagents and skills tailored for the Laravel framework. Ideal for Laravel developers using or planning to use Claude Code.

name: cenconq25/claude-code-app-studio
summary: A coordinated team of 53 Claude Code subagents that build, ship, and operate mobile apps end to end. Each agent owns a narrow slice of the lifecycle so that responsibility, expertise, and review checkpoints stay separated and observable.

en.name: cenconq25/claude-code-app-studio
en.summary: A coordinated team of 53 Claude Code subagents that build, ship, and operate mobile apps end to end. Each agent owns a narrow slice of the lifecycle so that responsibility, expertise, and review checkpoints stay separated and observable.

llm_summary.zh: 该项目是一个基于 Claude Code 的 53 个子代理协调框架，用于端到端构建、发布和运营移动应用。每个代理负责生命周期中的特定环节，实现职责分离和可审计的检查点。适合需要自动化移动应用开发流程、探索多 Agent 协作的团队或开发者。
llm_summary.en: This project is a coordination framework for 53 Claude Code subagents that build, ship, and operate mobile apps end to end. Each agent owns a narrow slice of the lifecycle to keep responsibility and review checkpoints separated. It is suitable for teams or developers looking to automate mobile app development workflows and explore multi-agent collaboration.

llm_summary.zh: nested-subagent 是一个为 Claude Code 提供嵌套子代理能力的扩展工具。它允许子代理递归地创建自己的子代理，从而实现更复杂的分层任务分解，适合需要在大模型中实现多级代理协作的开发者。
llm_summary.en: nested-subagent is an extension that enables nested subagents in Claude Code, allowing subagents to spawn their own subagents for recursive task decomposition. It is suitable for developers who need multi-level agent collaboration in large models.
